'''madhosho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:lea|lea]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-dh-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lea|lea]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| madhosho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mædhesheth|mædhesheth]] || [[word:mædheshej|mædheshej]] || [[word:mædheshesh|mædheshesh]] || [[word:mædheshe|mædheshe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:madhodhoshoth|madhodhoshoth]] || [[word:madhodhoshoj|madhodhoshoj]] || [[word:madhodhoshosh|madhodhoshosh]] || [[word:madhodhosho|madhodhosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:madhoshoth|madhoshoth]] || [[word:madhoshoj|madhoshoj]] || [[word:madhoshosh|madhoshosh]] || [[word:madhosho|madhosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:madhofshoth|madhofshoth]] || [[word:madhofshoj|madhofshoj]] || [[word:madhofshosh|madhofshosh]] || [[word:madhofshof|madhofshof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:madhoshotho|madhoshotho]] || [[word:madhoshojo|madhoshojo]] || [[word:madhoshosho|madhoshosho]] || [[word:madhoshoko|madhoshoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:madhoshoth|madhoshoth]] || [[word:madhoshoj|madhoshoj]] || [[word:madhoshosh|madhoshosh]] || [[word:madhosho|madhosho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:madhoshothol|madhoshothol]] || [[word:madhoshojol|madhoshojol]] || [[word:madhoshoshol|madhoshoshol]] || [[word:madhoshokol|madhoshokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:madhoshothotho|madhoshothotho]] || [[word:madhoshojojo|madhoshojojo]] || [[word:madhoshoshosho|madhoshoshosho]] || [[word:madhoshoko|madhoshoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:madhoshothon|madhoshothon]] || [[word:madhoshojon|madhoshojon]] || [[word:madhoshoshon|madhoshoshon]] || [[word:madhoshokon|madhoshokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:madhoshothoro|madhoshothoro]] || [[word:madhoshojoro|madhoshojoro]] || [[word:madhoshoshoro|madhoshoshoro]] || [[word:madhoshokoro|madhoshokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
